name: heph-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugins for the heph build system, co-located with the docs.

plugins.name: heph-expert
plugins.description: Expert assistance for the heph build system: author BUILD files, debug caching and sandbox issues, wire up CI, and explain the target graph.

plugins.name: heph-go
plugins.description: Set up and maintain Go under heph: enable the go provider and drivers, wire generated code (go_src / go_codegen_root / go_codegen_deps) and test fixtures (go_test_data), and keep :build/:test green.
